diagnostics.message: unresolved toplevel call to `do_work`. If a project file defines `do_work` via a toplevel `def` or a monkey-patch on Object/Kernel, list that file in `.rigor.yml`'s `pre_eval:` (ADR-17) so the analyzer sees it.
`return' inside `ensure' discards the method's in-flight return value and swallows any in-flight exception
